Since this post doesn’t specify an explicit image, the first image in the post will be used in the listing page of posts.

title: Post With Code
text: This is a post with executable code.

title: Crisis
text:
I can’t breathe.
This wasn’t supposed to happen.
I’m not stupid.
I’m not stupid.
Am I?
There are no options remaining. There is no hope of recovery. I must flee the country.
Yesterday, something terrifying happened. Something I still don’t fully understand. Am I reaching the edge of my ability?

I haven’t failed before.
What do I do now?
